# QuoteFoundry

> Quoting software for US metal fabrication and welding job shops (5–50 people).
> An estimator turns a custom job into an accurate, branded PDF quote in about
> 10 minutes, priced from the shop's OWN stored rates through a deterministic
> engine — never AI guesswork. Flat per-shop pricing with no per-user fees.

## What it does

- Rate library per shop: material $/lb, labor rates (cutting/fitting/welding/finishing), machine burn rate, consumables, drop/scrap %, overhead %, target margin %.
- Live quote editor: enter weight, hours, and outside services; the price updates on every keystroke using the same pure pricing engine that saves the quote.
- Rate snapshotting: every quote freezes the rates it was priced with — editing shop rates never changes an existing quote.
- Branded customer PDF (three templates) that shows scope and total only; internal cost, overhead, and margin never appear on the customer document.
- Tracked email send from an authenticated domain, with open detection.
- Document Assist: drop an RFQ spreadsheet and the editor pre-fills deterministically (zero AI tokens); PDFs and CAD files are stored with the quote.
- Bulk import for customer lists and material price lists (CSV/XLSX).

## Who it's for

Small US metal-fab, sheet-metal, structural-steel, and welding job shops that
quote by hand in spreadsheets today and lose jobs to slow turnaround or lose
margin to underbidding. It is not CAD, CAM, ERP, or MRP.

## Pricing

Currently in a founding-partner beta: free during beta, with a founding price
locked in when it becomes paid. Pricing is flat per shop — no per-user fees.

## Key pages

- Home: https://quotefoundry.app/
- Guide — How to price a fabrication job: https://quotefoundry.app/guides/how-to-price-a-fabrication-job.html
- Free fabrication quote template (CSV): https://quotefoundry.app/guides/free-fabrication-quote-template.html
